/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/dbms_sql_tests.dir/tests/sql/lexer_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_sql_tests.dir/tests/sql/parser_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_sql_tests.dir/tests/sql/executor_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_sql_tests.dir/src/sql/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_sql_tests.dir/src/sql/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_sql_tests.dir/src/sql/executor.cpp.o -o dbms_sql_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
